title: Item Default Values Stopped Working
excerpt:
On a board that I am an owner of the item default values have stopped working. 
The values appear in the ‘Default values for new Item’ pop up and i can edit/amend and save, but when a new item (row) is added to the board…

posts.author: NIC (Nicky)
posts.cookedHtml:
On a board that I am an owner of the item default values have stopped working.

The values appear in the ‘Default values for new Item’ pop up and i can edit/amend and save, but when a new item (row) is added to the board the default values are not appearing, as they where.

Does anyone know how i can fix this?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Nicky!

Sometimes this happens if there is a form being used simultaneously on the board to create items or another “create item” automation is in use.

Do you know if either of those situations might be the case here? If not, send us a DM on any of our social media platforms or get support here so we can investigate this with you.
